final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post banner.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile-shot documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 wide horizontal layout with generous negative space for text overlay; city skyline as dominant horizontal sweep
Subject: must include a city dusk skyline with gradually brightening neon lights, hurrying pedestrians in the foreground, and distant skyscrapers reflecting the last sunlight
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk environment — neon signs beginning to glow, golden sunset reflected on glass towers, real street-level presence
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic high-contrast golden-hour-to-dusk atmosphere — exact light source mix and shadow depth are yours
Color palette: needs a warm-to-cool dusk direction with neon accent pops — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution 8K-texture photographic surface treatment — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary, bold modern typeface, prominent position); "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (medium, secondary, subtitle); "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small, watermark, bottom-right or bottom area)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal ratio; must leave sufficient clear zones for text overlay; all three text elements must be legible against the background
Avoid: overly staged or studio-lit look; flat or low-contrast lighting; cluttered composition that leaves no room for text
